readings.Aries: High-velocity particle detected. Collision imminent — harness the momentum before decay.
readings.Taurus: Crystal lattice integrity verified. Structural persistence exceeds all stress-test parameters.
readings.Gemini: Synaptic cross-talk elevated. Reduce cognitive load; parallel processing exceeds bandwidth.
readings.Cancer: Immune response primed. Threat neutralised at the boundary before reaching the core.
readings.Leo: Signal-to-noise ratio excellent. The sample stands out from background — no amplification needed.
readings.Virgo: Calibration curve linear across five orders of magnitude. Measurement uncertainty negligible.
readings.Libra: Phase diagram intersection: triple point. All three states coexist — a rare stability window.
readings.Scorpio: Redox potential maximally negative. Strong reductant active — old bonds will be broken today.
readings.Sagittarius: Long-read sequencing initiated. Full-length transcript reveals structure invisible to short reads.
readings.Capricorn: Compression test passed at maximum load. Material yields precisely at the theoretical limit.
readings.Aquarius: Atmospheric anomaly recorded. Standard model fails — new physics required to explain the signal.
readings.Pisces: Diffusion coefficient elevated. Solute dispersing freely through the medium without direction.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from per-sign reading pools; changes each day
